rust_agent_tasks.instructions: Create Anchor program manifest. Add prediction_market as workspace member. Set anchor-lang and anchor-spl dependencies with latest versions.

Implement Anchor program declaring prediction market module. Include: initialize_market, create_outcome, place_bet, resolve_market, claim_winnings. Use latest Anchor macros and error handling patterns. Add PDA seeds for market, outcome, and bet accounts.

Define market, outcome, and bet account structs with proper Anchor #[account] attributes. Include creation_ts, resolution_ts, total_stake, resolved flag. Use u64 for amounts, Pubkey for authority and oracle.
Create Anchor program manifest for NFT tokenizer. Add mpl-token-metadata as optional dependency. Ensure anchor-lang compatibility.
Implement NFT tokenizer program. Include: create_collection, mint_nft, fractionalize, merge_fractions. Use Metaplex Token Metadata standard. PDA seeds for collection, mint, and fraction vault.
Define collection, nft_mint, and fraction_vault account structs. Include metadata uri, supply, royalty_bps. Derive BorshSerialize/Deserialize for all state.
Create minimal Anchor registry program. Used for indexing deployed programs and markets. Lightweight manifest.
Implement registry program: register_program, register_market, list_programs. Single global registry account with vector of program/market info. PDA for registry authority.
Root Anchor workspace. Declare programs: prediction_market, nft_tokenizer, registry. Set [provider] cluster to localnet/devnet. Add [scripts] for local deployment. Linux Mint compatible paths.

frontend_agent_tasks.instructions: Create Next.js app with TypeScript. Dependencies: next, react, @solana/wallet-adapter-react, @solana/wallet-adapter-react-ui, @solana/wallet-adapter-wallets, @solana/web3.js, @coral-xyz/anchor, tailwindcss. Dev deps: typescript, @types/node, @types/react.

Create WalletProvider wrapper using @solana/wallet-adapter-react. Wrap with WalletModalProvider. Support Phantom, Solflare, Backpack. Configure for devnet and mainnet. Export useWallet, useConnection hooks.
Create Anchor Program client factory. Load IDL from public folder. Accept programId and connection. Export typed program instances for prediction_market and nft_tokenizer.
Landing page with wallet connect, quick links to Prediction Markets and NFT Tokenizer. Use Tailwind. Responsive layout. Show connection status and wallet balance.
Prediction markets dashboard. List active markets, create market form, place bet modal. Use Anchor client for prediction_market program. Display odds, volume, resolution status.
NFT tokenizer UI. Upload metadata, mint NFT, fractionalize flow. Integrate with nft_tokenizer program. Show collection gallery and fraction balances.
Navigation bar with wallet adapter button, links to /, /prediction-markets, /nft-tokenizer. Use WalletMultiButton from @solana/wallet-adapter-react-ui.
Tailwind base, components, utilities. Custom theme for Solana purple accent. Dark mode optional.
Next.js config. Enable standalone output for Docker. Add webpack config for @solana packages if needed.
Tailwind v3 config. Content paths: ./src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}. Extend colors with Solana brand palette.
Bash script to start local Solana validator. Use solana-test-validator. Pre-load programs if available. Optimized for Linux Mint. Log to ./logs/validator.log.
Deploy all Anchor programs to devnet/mainnet. Accept --cluster arg. Run anchor build, anchor deploy. Save program IDs to .env or config. Linux Mint compatible.
Multi-stage Dockerfile. Stage 1: build Next.js app (npm run build). Stage 2: nginx or node to serve. Expose 3000. Optimized for Vultr. Minimal base image.
Docker Compose for Vultr deployment. Services: app (Next.js), optionally backend (FastAPI). Use env_file for RPC_URL, program IDs. Health checks. Restart policy.
